framework.primary: Python 3.11 (asyncio-based; no ML framework needed — LLM inference is API-based)
framework.exchange: ccxt (async) — pluggable; abstract base for DEX adapters
framework.rationale: This is an LLM orchestration system, not a neural network training framework. The core is asyncio event loops, SQLite persistence, Ollama REST calls, and exchange connectivity.

methods: async def update(asset: str, price: float, timestamp: datetime) -> TriggerEvent | None
files.description: Rolling Z-score computation and pipeline trigger logic

methods: def compute_rho_cb(asset: str, window: int) -> float
def compute_z_tilde(z_score: float, kappa: float) -> float
def compute_omega(z_tilde: float, rho_cb: float, alpha: float) -> float
files.description: Composite CBD score: decorrelation + saturated anomaly

methods: async def log_busy(asset: str, z_score: float, timestamp: datetime) -> None
async def get_briefing(asset: str, limit: int) -> str
async def store_vol_sample(asset: str, z_score: float, price: float) -> None
files.description: SQLite WAL-mode persistence: trades, vol_history, pipeline_log, ollama_calls

methods: async def analyze(context: MarketContext, memory_briefing: str, omega: float) -> AnalystOutput | None
files.description: Zero-shot LLM call with structured JSON output; self-abstention via wait signal
Layer A: 4 deterministic hard gates. Layer B: LLM position sizing.

methods: async def execute(rm_output: RiskManagerOutput, mode: Literal['DRY_RUN', 'LIVE']) -> ExecutionRecord
files.description: DRY_RUN: log without order. LIVE: route through privacy channel.
Orchestrates Analyst → RiskManager → Executor with IGP gating

methods: async def get_ohlcv(asset: str, limit: int) -> list[OHLCVBar]
files.description: Async market data fetcher; direct HTTPS public channel
Abstract exchange adapter + DEX implementation with Tor/VPN routing

methods: async def complete(system_prompt: str, user_prompt: str, model: str) -> str
files.description: Thin async wrapper around Ollama REST API with telemetry logging
Pydantic v2 typed schemas — the JSON contracts between agents
Pydantic settings model loading from config.yaml
60-second polling loop across all monitored assets

main_loop: → IGP.acquire() → bool (discard if False, log pipeline_busy)
if AnalystOutput is None (wait): log self-abstention, IGP.release()

entrypoints.description: Retroactive transaction cost sensitivity analysis (Table 7 reproduction)
Query and export trades from episodic memory SQLite
Compute all Table 5 performance metrics from trades DB

risk_assessment.description: Agno framework is custom and not publicly available; must reimplement orchestration with asyncio
risk_assessment.mitigation: Use asyncio.Lock for IGP, simple async function chaining for SDP; no framework needed

risk_assessment.description: DEX exchange identity not specified; ccxt may not support the exact exchange
risk_assessment.mitigation: Abstract ExchangeAdapter base class; provide Hyperliquid + dYdX implementations as examples; mark as TODO

risk_assessment.description: Full agent prompts not given beyond excerpts; reasoning quality depends on prompt engineering
risk_assessment.mitigation: Implement the excerpted prompts exactly; add TODO markers for prompt tuning

risk_assessment.description: LLM temperature not specified; non-zero temp breaks determinism claims
risk_assessment.mitigation: Default temperature=0 with comment; make configurable

risk_assessment.description: Tor availability at runtime is environment-dependent
risk_assessment.mitigation: Safety gate: tor_active check before LIVE orders; DRY_RUN works without Tor

risk_assessment.description: Correlation method for CBD not specified (Pearson assumed)
risk_assessment.mitigation: Implement Pearson via numpy; add config flag for Spearman alternative
